title: JNTU-GV E-Payment Gateway
description: Sole architect and lead developer of the university's comprehensive E-Payment software. Managed end-to-end lifecycle including planning, architectural design, secure integrations, deployment, and ongoing server maintenance.

title: Digital Monitoring Cell (V1 & V2)
description: Architected and engineered the central Digital Monitoring Cell platform for JNTU-GV. Led the initial development and subsequent V1 and V2 iterative scaling to monitor university-wide digital traffic.

title: JNTU-GV Official Portal & CMS Console
description: Co-developed the primary digital presence and enterprise portal for Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University Gurajada Vizianagaram. Continually deploying and maintaining this infrastructure as the University Server Administrator.

title: Directorate of Research & Development Portal
description: Engineered the official web portal for the DR&D department at JNTU-GV. Built robust architectures for handling research submissions, grants tracking, and faculty publications.

title: Alumni Network Platform
description: Co-developed the dedicated Alumni Portal Page and Job Opportunities Cell infrastructure for JNTU-GV, facilitating seamless career networking and job dispatching for thousands of graduates.

title: Job Opportunities Cell
description: Co-developed the dedicated Alumni Portal Page and Job Opportunities Cell infrastructure for JNTU-GV, facilitating seamless career networking and job dispatching for thousands of graduates.

title: PGCPAITL - Website & Application Manager
description: Developed both the main website and the internal application manager for PGCPAITL, alongside a secure Internal E-Office administrative system and the dedicated web page for the Pharmacy department.

title: ML Model Compression Architecture
description: B.Tech Major Project: Researched and implemented adaptive compression strategies for code-centric NLP models. Overcame severe resource constraints (Intel Pentium, 8GB RAM) and strict VPS utilization limits through aggressive quantization and pruning to successfully complete model training and deployment.

title: Enterprise Hotel Management API System
description: Developed robust backend infrastructure for comprehensive hotel management. Built secure REST APIs handling reservations, real-time availability sync, and relational data architecture using MySQL.

title: RRM PhD Registration Platform
description: Engineered an end-to-end registration platform optimized for concurrent users. Designed dynamic MySQL schemas to handle complex form data and established a secure file ingestion pipeline.

title: Service Request Dispatch Engine
description: Deployed a monolithic enterprise Java application for reliable service ticketing. Leveraged Servlets and JDBC with heavily optimized SQL transactions to guarantee absolute data consistency under load.
